code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()

  if n <= 1
    println("YES")
  else
    let first_str = match parts.get(0)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      "0"
    end
    mut prev = match string.parse_int(first_str)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut sorted = true
    mut i = 1

    while i < n
      let cur_str = match parts.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        "0"
      end
      let cur = match string.parse_int(cur_str)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if cur < prev
        sorted = false
      end
      prev = cur
      i = i + 1
    end

    if sorted
      println("YES")
    else
      println("NO")
    end
  end

  Ok(())
end
